semeval.reason: 5-way entailment labels; no second-annotator column retained

saf.reason: single gold score per answer; no second-grader column

asap_sas.note: Score2 is withheld on the test split; IAA measured on train+dev rater reads.

mohler.reason: score is the average of two graders; per-grader reads not retained

powergrading.reason: binary consensus label; per-grader reads not retained

mindreading.reason: single ordinal annotation per response in our schema
